strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) with deep expertise in the required primary stack, including TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Demonstrated experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and agentic workflows, directly aligning with the job's niche requirements.
Exceptional testing background, including creating custom testing libraries, applying TDD, and teaching automated testing courses.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are specified as part of the primary stack.
Kotlin and Python are not listed on the resume, despite being noted in the required technical skills for backend services.
Has a history of relatively short tenures in several previous roles (1-2 years), which could raise minor retention questions.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack engineer whose extensive background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React closely matches the core requirements. His recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and strong foundation in software craftsmanship, particularly in automated testing and architecture, make him a uniquely strong fit. While he lacks explicit experience with Nest.js and Kotlin, his proven ability to adapt to diverse technologies and build complex, scalable systems strongly indicates he will succeed in this role.
